title: Set appropriate Status Codes on HTTP responses
description: HTTP responses should always have the correct status code set to accurately reflect the outcome of the request. Failing to set the appropriate status code can mislead clients and cause improper handling of responses.
recommendation: Always set the correct HTTP status code on responses, especially in error handling and REST controllers.
impact: Clients may misinterpret the result of an operation, leading to incorrect application behavior or security issues.

target_check.message: Always set appropriate HTTP status codes. Avoid using only ResponseEntity.ok() without proper error handling.
